name: fluidsim
tagline: Reference/how-to skill for running FluidSim CFD simulations (Navier-Stokes, shallow water, stratified flows) with pseudospectral FFT solvers
verdict: Clean, narrowly-scoped skill: no credential access, no unsolicited network calls beyond a plain `pip install`, no shell-piped remote code, no obfuscation, and no hidden or manipulative instructions found. Minor documentation gaps (no negative triggers, no troubleshooting/re-run guidance) but nothing that endangers a user who installs it.

highlights.summary: No explicit 'do not use when' guidance (e.g. non-periodic domains, non-spectral methods, unstructured meshes) — a user with an unsupported problem type has no signal to look elsewhere.
No explicit statement of what a completed task should return/produce (e.g. expected files, report format) — the doc shows API calls but not a defined deliverable contract.

Only one failure mode is addressed ('Parameters object raises AttributeError for typos', line 148); no guidance on common runtime failures like missing FFT backend, MPI misconfiguration, or convergenc
